nodes.name: .gitignore
nodes.summary: Version control exclusion configuration that ignores build artifacts, logs, node_modules, and editor-specific files for the React development environment.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project documentation describing the React + Vite template setup, available plugin options, React Compiler status, and guidance on expanding ESLint configuration for production applications.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint configuration file that enforces recommended rules for JavaScript/JSX files, with React Hooks and React Refresh plugin integrations for development workflow.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ESLint flat config format with plugin-based rule composition for modern JavaScript/JSX linting.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point that serves the application with a root div mounting point and loads the React application from src/main.jsx as an ES module.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project configuration and dependency manifest defining build/dev/lint scripts, React and Vite as core dependencies, and ESLint/Vite plugins as development tools.

nodes.name: vite.config.js
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration enabling React support via the @vitejs/plugin-react with HMR capabilities for fast development iteration.

nodes.name: package-lock.json
nodes.summary: Dependency lock file that pins exact versions of all npm packages and transitive dependencies for reproducible builds across environments.
